title: Smart Data Models - OpenStreetMap / OSMRoute
description: Established routes from OpenStreetMap tagged with route=*. This data model is a derivative work based on the OpenStreetMap Wiki, licensed under CC BY-SA 2.0 by OpenStreetMap contributors.

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be OSMRoute

osmId.description: Property. The original OpenStreetMap element integer identifier.

osmType.description: Property. The type of the original OSM element.

osmLastModified.description: Property. Timestamp of the last modification.

routeType.description: Property. The OSM route tag classifying the path or service. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:route'

ref.description: Property. Reference number or route name (e.g. bus number). Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:ref'

network.description: Property. The name of the network this route belongs to (e.g. VTM, RTM). Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:network'

distance.description: Property. Approximate distance of the route in metres. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:distance'

seeAlso.description: Property. List of URIs pointing to additional resources.
